more_vertTo "grab" or download the video from the Hailuo AI canvas link you provided, you will need to access the project directly on the platform.[1] Since the URL points to an Agent Canvas (a private creation workspace), the video is only directly accessible to the account that created it.[1]Here is how you can download it:Open the Project: Navigate to the provided URL https://hailuoai.video/agent/canvas/466528580633096199.[1]Locate the Final Video: Once the AI Agent has finished generating the clips, look for the "Final Cut" or the individual video blocks on the canvas.[1]Click Download:Hover over the video clip or click on it to open the preview.[1]Click the Download button (typically located in the bottom right of the video player or in the sidebar).[1]You will usually be given a choice to download it with or without a watermark (depending on your subscription plan).[1]Check Your Assets: If you can't see the download button on the canvas, go to the "Assets" tab in your Hailuo AI dashboard.[1] All generated videos are stored there and have a direct download icon.[1]Note on Public Sharing:If you are trying to grab a video created by someone else, that specific "canvas" link is not a public view.[1] You would need the Public Share Link (which usually looks like hailuoai.video/video/...) to view or download it without being logged into the creator's account.[1]If you are encountering a specific error while trying to download, please let me know!
